translations.name: Texas Aging and Disability Resource Center (ADRC)
translations.description: Aging and Disability Resource Centers (ADRCs) provide free information, referrals, and options counseling for long-term services and supports. They help older adults, people with disabilities, and caregivers understand and connect to the care and support options available to them.
translations.website_description: Free information, referral, and options counseling for long-term services and supports.
